/* Vendor libraries documentation */

This folder contains external libraries and dependencies that might be used in the portfolio project.

## Common vendor libraries:

### CSS Frameworks
- Bootstrap - Responsive CSS framework
- Tailwind CSS - Utility-first CSS framework
- Foundation - Responsive framework

### JavaScript Libraries
- jQuery - DOM manipulation
- GSAP - Advanced animations
- Three.js - 3D graphics
- Animate.css - Pre-made animations

### Icon Libraries
- Bootstrap Icons - Icon set (currently used via CDN)
- Font Awesome - Popular icon library
- Material Icons - Google Material Design icons

### Utilities
- Normalize.css - Browser consistency
- Reset.css - CSS defaults
- Animate on Scroll - Scroll animations

## Setup Instructions

To add a vendor library:

1. Download the library files
2. Place them in this folder
3. Link them in your `index.html` file

Example:
```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/vendor/bootstrap/css/bootstrap.min.css">
<script src="assets/vendor/gsap/gsap.min.js"></script>
```

## Current Setup

The portfolio currently uses:
- Bootstrap Icons (via CDN)
- Google Fonts (via CDN)
- No local vendor files yet

If you want to use offline versions or additional libraries, add them here.
